title: malus sylvestris var. praecox
intro: Malus sylvestris var. praecox, also known as early crab apple, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The early crab apple is used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and fighting off pathogens. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat the mentioned health issues.
